name: Cas9 gRNA Designer
description: Scans a DNA target sequence for all NGG PAM sites, takes the 20 nt immediately upstream of each as the protospacer, appends the SpCas9 tracrRNA scaffold, and returns up to 10 candidates in order of appearance. No scoring or ranking.

inputs.name: seq
inputs.description: DNA target sequence to scan for the first NGG PAM site. Accepts a resource name (e.g. 'ecoli_rpsl'), a raw sequence string, FASTA content, or GenBank content. The framework resolves the format automatically.

outputs.description: A list of up to 10 candidates in order of position. Each has grna_sequence (full RNA gRNA: protospacer + tracrRNA scaffold, T→U), protospacer (20 bp DNA), and pam_site (3 bp NGG).
